findings.description: The source explicitly states that to use various log output functions, BOTH basic log settings (log-basic_setting) AND app-log.properties are required: 'このため、各種ログの出力機能を使うには、log-basic_setting に加えて、各種ログの設定が必要となる。' The knowledge file omits this prerequisite dependency and the architectural context that various log functions only handle formatting while using the base logging system for actual output.
findings.source_evidence: 各種ログの出力機能は、各種ログの用途に合わせたフォーマット処理のみを行っており、ログの出力処理自体は本機能を使用している。...このため、各種ログの出力機能を使うには、log-basic_setting に加えて、各種ログの設定が必要となる。

findings.description: hints for 'extensions' section are missing PascalCase class names used in code examples: 'ObjectSettings' (used in CustomBootProcessItem constructor parameter) and 'LogContext' (used as generic type parameter in LogItem<LogContext> and Map<String, LogItem<LogContext>>).
findings.source_evidence: public CustomBootProcessItem(ObjectSettings settings) { ... } and public class CustomBootProcessItem implements LogItem<LogContext>
